output.dependency: The text source/category value appears to determine the format and interpretation of the flight identifier field; the identifier is a structured code of the form airline-flightnumber-origin-destination (for example, AA-2268-PHX-ORD), and both source values refer to the same structured flight record.

The structured flight identifier, which includes origin and destination airport codes, appears to determine the scheduled departure time. The same flight code has the same scheduled departure time across rows.

The structured flight identifier, which includes origin and destination airport codes, appears to determine the actual departure time. The same flight code has the same actual departure time across rows.

The structured flight identifier, which includes origin and destination airport codes, appears to determine the scheduled arrival time. The same flight code has the same scheduled arrival time across rows.
The structured flight identifier, which includes origin and destination airport codes, appears to determine the actual arrival time. The same flight code has the same actual arrival time across rows.
The scheduled departure time and scheduled arrival time are semantically linked as the planned time interval for the same flight record; they describe the planned start and end of the same trip.
The actual departure time and actual arrival time are semantically linked as the realized time interval for the same flight record; they describe the actual start and end of the same trip.
